--- Round 1 --- The question asks which company has the highest "应收账款" (accounts receivable). I need to find the accounts receivable value in this document (DOC1). Looking at the document structure, the most likely place to find "应收账款" would be: - [2.1] 主要会计数据和财务指标 - might have summary financial data - [5.1.1] 合并资产负债表 - the balance sheet would definitely contain accounts receivable Let me start by opening section [2.1] to see if there's summary financial data, and then [5.1.1] for the detailed balance sheet. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"主要会计数据和财务指标，可能包含应收账款相关数据"} （一）主要会计数据和财务指标 公司是否需追溯调整或重述以前年度会计数据 □是 区否 |-|本报告期|上年同期|本报告期比上年同期增减（%）| |---|---|---|---| |营业收入（元）|1,392,029,678.89|1,553,392,936.78|-10.39%| |归属于上市公司股东的净利润（元）|-20,871,739.14|133,378,983.03|-115.65%| |归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润

Looking at the content, I can see various financial metrics like: - 营业收入 (Operating revenue) - 归属于上市公司股东的净利润 (Net profit attributable to shareholders) - 经营活动产生的现金流量净额 (Net cash flow from operating activities) - 总资产 (Total assets) - 归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益 (Owner's equity attributable to shareholders) However, I do NOT see "应收账款" (accounts receivable) in this section. This section only has summary financial indicators, not the detailed balance sheet items. I need to open the balance sheet section [5.1.1] 合并资产负债表 to find the accounts receivable value. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"5.1.1","expected_evidence":"合并资产负债表，包含应收账款的具体数值"} 1、合并资产负债表
